verse.name: v1
verse.lines: If I was a rainbow I'd show my colors for You If I was a songbird I'd sing my song for You And if You take the sun and the moon Take away the stars at night Your faithful Word will always be my light.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Beautiful such a miracle That You would give up Heaven just for me All I wanna do is fall more in love with You, This world doesn't owe me anymore And one thing that I do know for sure.
